title: hieracium pannosum subsp. friwaldii
intro: Hieracium pannosum subsp. friwaldii, also known as Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's leaves, flowers, and roots have been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced digestion. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often used as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
